image_modality.Description: Modality in which structural images were acquired, either research-grade or clinical-grade and MR or CT

approximate_numeracy.Description: Z-score of performance on a computer-based dot comparison task

precise_numeracy.Description: Composite Z-score of performance on several precise numeracy tasks: Western Aphasia Battery (WAB) Auditory Word Recognition numerical items, WAB Supplemental Number Writing and Dictated Numbers, WAB Supplemental Calculation, and Comprehensive Aphasia Test Calculation

aphasia_quotient.Description: Aphasia severity score based on Western Aphasia Battery-Revised (WAB) performance

lesion_volume.Description: Total lesion volume within the left hemisphere

education_years.Description: Years of formal education that the participant completed
